# Requirements Readiness Checklist: Remote Control Display

**Purpose**: Validate whether the remote control display requirements are complete, clear, consistent, and ready for implementation planning.
**Created**: 2026-06-18
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are administrator-only access requirements defined for both viewing and changing remote control state? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001, §FR-002]
- [x] CHK002 Are all content modes that belong in scope explicitly listed, with future modes excluded or deferred? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003, §FR-004, Assumptions]
- [x] CHK003 Are requirements defined for selecting only existing valid iframe content records? [Completeness, Spec §FR-004, §FR-005]
- [x] CHK004 Are ads visibility requirements defined for both hidden and visible states? [Completeness, Spec §FR-007, §FR-008, §FR-009]
- [x] CHK005 Are hot-applied display configuration requirements documented for every display setting that can affect a running display? [Completeness, Spec §FR-015, §FR-016]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK006 Is the polling interval bound specified with exact numeric limits and units? [Clarity, Spec §FR-014]
- [x] CHK007 Is the default startup state specified without ambiguity for both content mode and ads visibility? [Clarity, Spec §FR-011]
- [x] CHK008 Is "immediate" remote control behavior clarified as applying on the next successful configured polling check? [Clarity, Spec §SC-005, Assumptions]
- [x] CHK009 Is the conflict resolution rule for close-together remote control updates clearly stated? [Clarity, Spec §FR-024]
- [x] CHK010 Is the full-height content requirement specific enough to distinguish it from merely hiding ads? [Clarity, Spec §FR-008, §SC-003]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK011 Are the temporary remote control state requirements consistent with the default startup requirement? [Consistency, Spec §FR-011, Key Entities]
- [x] CHK012 Are hot configuration requirements consistent with the assumption that the kiosk has no practical local refresh or keyboard access? [Consistency, Spec §FR-015, Assumptions]
- [x] CHK013 Are iframe validation requirements consistent with the assumption that arbitrary URL entry is out of scope? [Consistency, Spec §FR-005, Assumptions]
- [x] CHK014 Are ads visibility requirements independent of content mode across stories, requirements, and success criteria? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 2, §FR-007, §SC-002]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK015 Can each success criterion be objectively verified with one kiosk display session and one administrator control session? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001 through §SC-013]
- [x] CHK016 Are success criteria defined for both valid state changes and rejected invalid iframe selections? [Coverage, Spec §SC-001, §SC-009]
- [x] CHK017 Are regression success criteria included for existing display behavior that must remain preserved? [Coverage, Spec §SC-010]
- [x] CHK018 Are measurable outcomes defined for hot polling interval changes and broader hot display configuration changes? [Coverage, Spec §SC-006, §SC-007]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK019 Are primary, alternate, and recovery flows covered for switching between loop and iframe modes? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 1, §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK020 Are primary and alternate flows covered for hiding and restoring ads? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 2]
- [x] CHK021 Are startup and restart expectations covered separately from running-session remote control behavior? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 4]
- [x] CHK022 Are administrator-visible feedback requirements defined for successful and failed remote control updates? [Coverage, Spec §FR-019, §FR-020]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK023 Are requirements defined for selected iframe content becoming unavailable while displayed? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases, §FR-018]
- [x] CHK024 Are requirements defined for no eligible iframe options being available? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK025 Are requirements defined for polling connectivity loss and recovery? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases, Assumptions]
- [x] CHK026 Are invalid polling interval values covered by explicit validation requirements? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-014]
- [x] CHK027 Are close-together update scenarios covered by a deterministic state rule? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-024]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK028 Are security requirements specific enough to prevent non-administrator control access? [Security, Spec §FR-002, §SC-008]
- [x] CHK029 Are observability requirements defined for invalid selections and hot configuration failures? [Observability, Spec §FR-023]
- [x] CHK030 Are resilience requirements defined for the display remaining recoverable after invalid or unavailable remote states? [Reliability, Spec §FR-018]
- [x] CHK031 Are accessibility expectations for the administrator-facing remote control mode captured with clear control and feedback requirements? [Accessibility, Spec §FR-025, §SC-013]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK032 Are dependencies on existing authentication, roles, iframe content records, and network connectivity documented? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK033 Are out-of-scope boundaries documented for multi-kiosk control, arbitrary URL entry, scheduling, and new media types? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK034 Are data lifecycle expectations clear enough for temporary remote state versus persistent display configuration? [Clarity, Spec §Key Entities, §FR-011]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
